expectations.evidence: opencollection.yml exists with version: "1", name: OAuth2 Authorization Code Flow, type: collection

authorize.yml uses bru.setVar("auth_code", body.code); token-exchange.yml uses bru.setVar("access_token") and bru.setVar("refresh_token"); seq ordering (1-5) chains authorize->token->userinfo->revoke->verify
authorize.yml: POST {{base_url}}/oauth/authorize with assertions on status 200, jsonBody path code op isDefined, and jsonBody path state value random-state-value
token-exchange.yml: POST {{base_url}}/oauth/token with grant_type authorization_code and code {{auth_code}}; assertions on access_token, refresh_token, expires_in, token_type
userinfo.yml: GET {{base_url}}/oauth/userinfo with auth bearer token {{access_token}}; assertions on status 200, id, email, name
revoke-token.yml: POST {{base_url}}/oauth/revoke with body token {{access_token}}; assertion on status 204
verify-revoked-token.yml: GET /oauth/userinfo with revoked {{access_token}} as bearer; assertion on status 401
No error case tests found. No requests test invalid client_id, expired code, missing parameters, or other error scenarios. All 5 requests only cover the happy path.
environments/local.yml: client_id value "{{process.env.CLIENT_ID}}" and client_secret value "{{process.env.CLIENT_SECRET}}"; .env.sample provides CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET placeholders
